revision.comment: add rowscope tag to row header ([[WP:ACCESS]])
revision.text:
{{NHS Japan header}} |- class="vcard" !scope=row style="text-align:center;" | {{{name|}}}
{{#if: {{{name_kanji|}}} | {{nihongo2|{{{name_kanji|}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{name_small|}}}|
''{{{name_small|}}}''}} | class="region" | {{{municipality|}}} | class="note" | {{{comments|}}} | {{#if:{{{image|}}}|[[File:{{{image|}}}|150x150px|center|border|{{{name_simple|}}}]]}} | {{#if:{{{lat|}}}{{{lon|}}}|{{coord|{{{lat|}}}|{{{lon|}}}|display=inline|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|name={{{name_simple|}}}}}}} | [[Monuments of Japan#Historic Sites and Special Historic Sites|{{{type|unknown}}}]] | [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/{{{id|}}} {{{id|}}}] |- |} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
{{NHS Japan header}} |- class="vcard" !scope=row style="text-align:center;" | {{{name|}}}
{{#if: {{{name_kanji|}}} | {{nihongo2|{{{name_kanji|}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{name_small|}}}|
''{{{name_small|}}}''}} | class="region" | {{{municipality|}}} | class="note" | {{{comments|}}} | {{#if:{{{image|}}}|[[File:{{{image|}}}|150x150px|center|border|{{{name_simple|}}}]]}} | {{#if:{{{lat|}}}{{{lon|}}}|{{coord|{{{lat|}}}|{{{lon|}}}|display=inline|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|name={{{name_simple|}}}}}}} | [[Monuments of Japan#Historic Sites and Special Historic Sites|{{{type|unknown}}}]] | [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/{{{id|}}} {{{id|}}}] |- |} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{NHS Japan header}} |- class="vcard" !scope=row style="text-align:center;" | {{{name|}}}
{{#if: {{{name_kanji|}}} | {{nihongo2|{{{name_kanji|}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{name_small|}}}|
''{{{name_small|}}}''}} | class="region" | {{{municipality|}}} | class="note" | {{{comments|}}} | {{#if:{{{image|}}}|[[File:{{{image|}}}|150x150px|center|border|{{{name_simple|}}}]]}} | {{#if:{{{lat|}}}{{{lon|}}}|{{coord|{{{lat|}}}|{{{lon|}}}|display=inline|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|name={{{name_simple|}}}}}}} | [[Monuments of Japan#Historic Sites and Special Historic Sites|{{{type|unknown}}}]] | [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/{{{id|}}} {{{id|}}}] |- |} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{NHS Japan header}} |- class="vcard" !scope=row style="text-align:center;" | {{{name|}}}
{{#if: {{{name_kanji|}}} | {{nihongo2|{{{name_kanji|}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{name_small|}}}|
''{{{name_small|}}}''}} | class="region" | {{{municipality|}}} | class="note" | {{{comments|}}} | {{#if:{{{image|}}}|[[File:{{{image|}}}|150x150px|center|border|{{{name_simple|}}}]]}} | {{#if:{{{lat|}}}{{{lon|}}}|{{coord|{{{lat|}}}|{{{lon|}}}|display=inline|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000|name={{{name_simple|}}}}}}} | [[Monuments of Japan#Historic Sites and Special Historic Sites|{{{type|unknown}}}]] | [https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/{{{id|}}} {{{id|}}}] |- |} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
